speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Thus far our fortune keeps an upward course,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And we are graced with wreaths of victory.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: But in the midst of this bright-shining day,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: I spy a black suspicious threat’ning cloud

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: That will encounter with our glorious sun

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Ere he attain his easeful western bed.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: I mean, my lords, those powers that the Queen

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Hath raised in Gallia have arrived our coast

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And, as we hear, march on to fight with us.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: A little gale will soon disperse that cloud

speaker: CLARENCE
text: And blow it to the source from whence it came;

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Thy very beams will dry those vapors up,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: For every cloud engenders not a storm.

speaker: RICHARD
text: The Queen is valued thirty thousand strong,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And Somerset, with Oxford, fled to her.

speaker: RICHARD
text: If she have time to breathe, be well assured

speaker: RICHARD
text: Her faction will be full as strong as ours.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: We are advertised by our loving friends

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: That they do hold their course toward Tewkesbury.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: We having now the best at Barnet Field

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Will thither straight, for willingness rids way,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And, as we march, our strength will be augmented

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: In every county as we go along.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Strike up the drum, cry “Courage!” and away.
